zh.Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯
zh.Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United: 英國蘇格蘭洛包爾林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Douglas於1305年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian19歲，母親Lady Joan Armstrong27歲。她於大約1324年與Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾林頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年11月在蘇格蘭洛包爾林頓享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛包爾林頓。

zh-hans.Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United: 英国苏格兰洛包爾林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Douglas于1305年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian19岁，母亲Lady Joan Armstrong27岁。她于大约1324年与Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath在苏格兰皮布萊爾林頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年11月在苏格兰洛包爾林頓享年52岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛包爾林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Douglas was born in 1305, in Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian, was 19 and her mother, Lady Joan Armstrong, was 27. She married Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath about 1324, in Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in November 1357, in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Douglas est née en 1305, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Armstrong, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath environ 1324, à Linton, Valle de Twede, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1357, à Linton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Linton, Roxburghshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Douglas 1305 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Armstrong 27. Sie hat um 1324 in Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1357 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland und wurde in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Douglas è nata il nel 1305 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Armstrong, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath circa 1324, nel Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1357, nel Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Douglasが1305年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothianは19歳，母Lady Joan Armstrongは27歳であった。約1324年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアリントンでSir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年11月にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリントンで52歳で死去し，スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Douglas(이)가 1305년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Armstrong(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1324년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 린턴에서 Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 11월 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 린턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Douglas nasceu em 1305, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Armstrong, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath aproximadamente 1324, em Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1357, em Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Douglas родилась в 1305 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Armstrong, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath около 1324 г. в местности линтон, пиблессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1357 г. в местности линтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности линтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Douglas nació en 1305, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir James Douglas of Hermiston and of Lothian, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Armstrong, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath aproximadamente 1324, en Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1357, en Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.
